'''Kendra Wall''' (born [[September 5]], [[1960s#1960|1960]]) is an actress who played an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].
